text:
is a conceptual Angel which was never used in any work, only appearing in Neon Genesis Evangelion Proposal documents. 

Profile

It is described as an "optical combat weapon" enshrouded by a rotating, crystal-like, multifaceted plate. It absorbs and stores electromagnetic energy, which it can then convert and use in attacks. The converted energy is apparently released through the core-like orbs on either end of its symmetrical body. 

Trivia

It may have been inspiration for the Angel Ramiel.
